ab: Camak, neka anga nu tja paday a vinava, sau vaiku a veneli.
ch: A:Camak，我們家裡沒有米酒了，你去買吧。
en: Camak, our home is out of rice wine, please go and buy some.

ab: izua anan a tanuita i kindraljum i kakesan, palaingi tua veneli.
ch: B:廚房裡還有一瓶，不用買吧!
en: There is still one bottle left in the kitchen, so there is no need to buy one!

ab: inika cengceng a tanuita i kindraljum, sau veliu anan tu tjanudrusa anga i kindraljum.
en: One bottle is not enough for me, go and buy two more back.

ab: muri veneli aken tua paday a vinava, izua nu sipaveliveli?
ch: M:我要買米酒，你們有賣嗎?
en: I am looking for rice wine. Do you have any rice wine?

ab: izua! pida su velin?
en: Yes! How many bottles do you need?

ab: veneli aken tu tjanudrusa i kindraljum, sake veli uta tu tanuita i tuvung tua paday.
ch: M:我要買兩瓶，還要買一袋米。
en: I want two bottles and a pack of rice.

ab: uza imaza sa paday, anemaneman a su kinakelekel?
ch: W:米在這裡，你還需要什麼嗎?
en: Here is the rice, what else do you need?

ab: veneli anan aken tua qecilu, izua nu sipaveliveli?
en: I want some eggs too, do you have some?

ab: nasepaveli anga nia qecilu a qemdjeljem.
en: We are out of eggs.

ab: muri veneli aken tua kava.
en: I want to buy some clothes.

ab: namakuda a kinakemudan na su varung?
en: What kind of clothes do you like?

ab: muri veneli aken tua drikidrikitj a lima nu kavan.
en: I want to buy the clothes with short sleeves.

ab: namakuda cu a qudjidjilj?
en: How about this red one?

ab: izua zuma quljav?
en: Do you have another color?

ab: izuanan a nia vucelacelay kata samljam.
en: We have white and blue ones too.

ab: pay pavay aken tu tacaucauan tua samljam a kava.
ch: M:請給我一件藍色的衣服。
en: Please give me the clothes in blue.

ab: Camak kasinu sun tasauni? na kipalalaciq sun?
ch: W:Camak你剛剛去哪裡?你去運動嗎?
en: Camak, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: Camak kasinu sun tasauni? na undu sun?
ch: W:Camak你剛剛去哪裡?你去運動嗎?
en: Camak, where have you been just now? Did you go exercising?

ab: ini, na vaik aken a pusaladj tjay vuvu a paveli tua ljaceng.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: ini, na vaik aken a pusaladj tjay kacumusu a paveli tua ljaceng.
en: No, I went grocery shopping for my grandma.

ab: manu kemuda, izua su cug nu qezemetj? makaya itjen a malingulj a keman?
ch: W:原來這樣啊，你晚上有沒有空?可不可以和我一起吃飯?
en: No wonder! Are you available at night? Would you like to have a meal with me?

ab: ikamakaya, muri vaik aken a veneli tua kava.
en: No, I want to buy some clothes.

ab: numatazua ari kiciur aken tjanusun.
ch: W:這樣的話，走我跟你一起去。
en: Then, I will go with you.

ab: pay pida kakavelian naicu a djinaljeng a ljaceng.
en: Hello, how much is this bunch of vegetables?

ab: nu tadjaljengan a ljaceng drusa puluq a vatan.
en: The vegetables are $20 for a bunch.

ab: aicu a vurasi pida a kakavelian.
en: How much are these sweet potatoes?

ab: nu tatjingtjingan a vurasi tjelu a puluq a vatan.
en: Sweet potatoes are thirty dollars for a pound.

ab: pay pavay aken tu drusa djaljeng ta ljaceng kata tatjingtjingan a vurasi.
ch: M:請給我兩把菜和一斤地瓜。
en: Please give me two bunches of vegetables and a pound of sweet potatoes.
